summary: Iteration 26 testing completed - All 15 test features verified. Backend APIs for Milestones, Cashflow, and Gantt all working. Frontend features including Copy skill row, Milestones/Cashflow buttons, Gantt upload section, Contingency ($) field all verified.
passed_tests: 2. Proficiency Rates page - Copy button exists on skill rows - PASS
3. Copy button opens dialog pre-filled with copied data - PASS
4. Estimator page loads existing project with waves - PASS
5. Milestones button appears in estimator toolbar - PASS
6. Cashflow button appears in estimator toolbar - PASS
7. Logistics settings dialog has Contingency ($) absolute field - PASS
8. Gantt Chart upload section (Timeline / Gantt Chart) appears - PASS
10. Payment Milestones page: Add milestone, wave selector, payment %, amount calc work - PASS
11. Payment Milestones: Save functionality works - PASS
13. Cashflow page: Monthly breakdown table shows cost data - PASS
14. Cashflow page: Export Excel button present - PASS
15. Sidebar navigation has Milestones and Cashflow links - PASS

backend_api_tests.GET /api/projects/{id}/cashflow: PASS - Returns monthly cashflow data with summary

critical_code_review_comments: All requested features are implemented and working correctly
contingency_absolute field properly integrated in logistics config
Payment Milestones page has proper wave selector with calculated amounts
Cashflow page shows monthly breakdown with visualization chart
Gantt chart upload section properly renders with Upload Image button
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing PRJ-0023 (dasg) with waves and allocations for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 features all verified: 1) Proficiency Rates - Copy button works, opens dialog pre-filled with rate data; 2) Estimator - Milestones and Cashflow buttons in toolbar navigate to respective pages with ?project={id}; 3) Gantt Chart section visible with Upload Image button; 4) Wave Logistics Configuration dialog has both Contingency % and Contingency ($) fields; 5) Payment Milestones page (/payment-milestones) - add milestones with wave selector, payment %, auto-calculated amount, save works; 6) Cashflow Statement page (/cashflow) - shows monthly breakdown, summary cards, visualization chart, Export Excel button; 7) Sidebar has Milestones (Target icon) and Cashflow (BarChart3 icon) links.

proficiency_rates.copy_button: PASS - Copy icon button on each rate row, opens Add Rate dialog pre-filled with skill, location, level, salary

project_estimator.milestones_button: PASS - Button in toolbar navigates to /payment-milestones?project={id}
project_estimator.cashflow_button: PASS - Button in toolbar navigates to /cashflow?project={id}
project_estimator.gantt_section: PASS - Timeline / Gantt Chart card with Upload Image button
project_estimator.contingency_absolute: PASS - Contingency ($) field in Wave Logistics Configuration dialog

payment_milestones_page.summary_cards: PASS - Total Milestones, Total Payment Amount, Waves
payment_milestones_page.wave_selector: PASS - Dropdown to select wave for milestone
payment_milestones_page.amount_calculation: PASS - Auto-calculated based on wave selling price and percentage
payment_milestones_page.save_functionality: PASS - Save button persists milestones to backend

cashflow_page.summary_cards: PASS - Total Outflow (Costs), Total Inflow (Revenue), Net Cashflow
cashflow_page.monthly_breakdown: PASS - Table with Month, Phase, Cost, Revenue, Net, Cumulative
cashflow_page.visualization: PASS - Monthly Cash Flow Visualization bar chart

api_endpoints_tested.PUT /api/projects/{id}/milestones: Saves milestones array with updated_at and updated_by
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/projects/{id}/cashflow: Returns project info, summary (total_cost, total_revenue, net_cashflow), and monthly_data array
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/projects/{id}/gantt: Uploads image with X-Filename and X-Content-Type headers
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/projects/{id}/gantt: Returns image binary with proper content-type
